details.test: Task 1: Book earliest thyroid video visit in CA with highly rated provider and self-pay
Task 2: Choose most affordable hormone optimization monthly plan with labs & messaging and start signup
Task 3: Save recent PCOS article about weight to library
Task 4: Request 90-day refill of testosterone to nearby pharmacy within 5 miles of 94105
Task 5: Complete perimenopause symptom checker and add fast virtual-care recommendation to care plan
Task 6: Update pronouns, communication prefs, and add emergency contact
Task 7: Estimate hormone treatment cost for HealthPlus Gold PPO and save estimate
Task 8: Send urgent message about estrogen patch side effects including recent symptom data
Task 9: Reschedule hormone follow-up (or next upcoming appointment) to evening slot at least 7 days later with same provider
